Class CookingCompleteEvent

java.lang.Object
org.bukkit.event.Event
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.event.CookingCompleteEvent
public final class CookingCompleteEvent extends org.bukkit.event.Event
Fired on the main thread when a station completes a recipe, before quality is rolled. Listeners may add quality shifts (addQualityShift(CookingQuality, double)), scale XP (multiplyXp(double)), and set a bonus drop (setBonusOutput(ItemStack)); the service then rolls quality and places output.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • CookingCompleteEvent

      public CookingCompleteEvent(org.bukkit.Location location, CookingRecipe recipe, UUID lastInteractor)
      Parameters:
      location - the location of the cooking station block
      recipe - the recipe that just completed
      lastInteractor - UUID of the player who last modified the station

  • Method Details

    • getLocation

      public org.bukkit.Location getLocation()
      Returns:
      the location of the cooking station block

    • getRecipe

      public CookingRecipe getRecipe()
      Returns:
      the recipe that completed

    • getLastInteractor

      public UUID getLastInteractor()
      Returns:
      the UUID of the player who last modified the station

    • addQualityShift

      public void addQualityShift(CookingQuality tier, double delta)
      Adds a weight delta for the given quality tier. Positive values increase the chance of that tier; negative values decrease it. Deltas from multiple listeners accumulate additively.
      Parameters:
      tier - the tier to shift
      delta - the weight delta to add

    • getQualityShifts

      public Map<CookingQuality, Double> getQualityShifts()
      Returns all accumulated per-tier quality weight deltas. The service passes these to QualityRoller after the event returns.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable view of quality shifts, keyed by tier

    • multiplyXp

      public void multiplyXp(double factor)
      Multiplies the accumulated XP multiplier by the given factor. The result is carried to the subsequent CookingXpEvent.
      Parameters:
      factor - the multiplier to apply, e.g. 1.5 for +50% XP

    • getXpMultiplier

      public double getXpMultiplier()
      Returns the accumulated XP multiplier from all listeners. Starts at 1.0; each call to multiplyXp(double) compounds it.
      Returns:
      the final XP multiplier

    • setBonusOutput

      public void setBonusOutput(@Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack bonusOutput)
      Sets a bonus item to be dropped naturally at the station block. Only the last listener to call this wins.
      Parameters:
      bonusOutput - the item to drop, or null to clear

    • getBonusOutput

      public @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack getBonusOutput()
      Returns the bonus item to be dropped naturally at the station, or null if none was set.
      Returns:
      bonus output, or null

    • setPreserveIngredient

      public void setPreserveIngredient(boolean preserveIngredient)
      Marks whether one matched ingredient should be spared from consumption this cook.
      Parameters:
      preserveIngredient - true to preserve one ingredient

    • isPreserveIngredient

      public boolean isPreserveIngredient()
      Returns:
      true if one matched ingredient should not be consumed this cook

      Specified by:
